entries.title: Public Bellmarked Reinterpretation
entries.purpose: Reinterpret existing public material after Bellmarked revelation without villain coding or changing the stable seat's musical identity.
entries.tempo_behavior: Retain the active stage pulse while shifting index placement and articulation.
entries.meter_behavior: Bellhouse positions become more explicit but never map to seat count.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Adds morally ambiguous brass-colored tension rather than a dark villain cadence.

transition_policy.entry: Enter only after public reveal SFX and text commit.
transition_policy.exit: Return to stage foundation when no revealed Bellmarked state remains relevant or cut for silence authority.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Short metal and piano gestures stay below reveal narration.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce metal attacks and remove transformation stem before altering the retained seat color.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original public Bellmarked music reinterpretation after authorized reveal: retain the stable seat's existing instrument color, add bowed oxidized metal, damped piano and low reed-organ indexing, morally ambiguous preservation rather than villainy, compatible with Drowned Harbor stage foundations, no bell strike, no secret motif, no speech.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: traitor theme, villain fanfare, evil choir, secret pre-reveal motif, spoken faction name, actual bell strike, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Bellmarked music appears only after public reveal and preserves the seat's identity while adding Harbor-index allegiance.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create a removable transformation stem and retain the original seat motif timbre in all public variants.

entries.approval_boundary: Revealed-faction music brief only; no final faction theme, hidden-state behavior, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Public Tidebound Reinterpretation
entries.purpose: Transform the Living Witness color through water-pulled memory while preserving stable-seat agency and recognizable identity.
entries.tempo_behavior: Retain stage motion with doubled or displaced attacks rather than faster tempo.
entries.meter_behavior: Original phrase continues with a second offset memory position.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Adds fluid upper clusters and displaced resonance without monster coding.

transition_policy.entry: Enter only after public transformation cue and visible form state commit.
transition_policy.exit: Remain eligible while the public Tidebound form is active; cut for controlled reveal or final confirmation.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Doubled memory layers remain sparse and nonverbal.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Remove granular and displaced layers first while retaining the original seat instrument color.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original public Tidebound music reinterpretation after transformation: retain the stable seat's familiar instrument color, add bowed cloudy glass, doubled low string, breathy woodwind and restrained granular water-like extension, original phrase continues with one displaced memory echo, active and intelligent rather than monstrous, no speech, no roar, no power-up.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: zombie theme, sea monster, villain music, superhero transformation, spoken memories, choir, action score, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, actual water SFX
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Tidebound music preserves the Living Witness identity while layering several water-pulled memories after public revelation.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create removable transformation and memory layers with a clear retained-seat core and profile-specific texture only.

entries.approval_boundary: Revealed-form music brief only; no final Tidebound theme, transformation logic, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Restless Continuation Color
entries.purpose: Carry the stable seat's motif into Bell-Witness, Drowned Guide, or Lighthouse Guardian instrumentation without mourning or elimination coding.
entries.tempo_behavior: Retain stage timing and change only articulation, register, and mechanism relationship.
entries.meter_behavior: Original seat phrase remains recognizable in a new public form.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Preserves witness intervals while shifting material resonance toward bell, water route, or lens.
instrumentation: Low woodwind and glass for Drowned Guide
Bowed glass and brass color for Lighthouse Guardian

transition_policy.entry: Enter only after public continuation-form transition commits.
transition_policy.exit: Remain while the public form is active; preserve seat motif through stage transitions.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Form colors remain sparse and never replace public activation SFX.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Remove mechanism and transformation colors while retaining the stable-seat witness phrase.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original modular afterlife-continuation music for active stable seats in Drowned Harbor: preserve the familiar Living Witness phrase, reinterpret it through bowed oxidized metal for Bell-Witness, low woodwind and cloudy glass for Drowned Guide, or bowed glass and brass color for Lighthouse Guardian, purposeful agency rather than mourning, no funeral music, no ghost choir, no elimination sting.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: funeral theme, player elimination, ghost choir, heavenly music, sad piano cliché, spoken oath, automatic sacrifice, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, victory theme
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Restless forms change actions and instrumentation but never remove the stable seat or erase its musical identity.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Author one retained witness core and three removable public-form color layers with stage-compatible transitions.

entries.approval_boundary: Continuation-color brief only; no final afterlife music, mechanics, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Harbor Sealed Ending Treatment
entries.purpose: Resolve containment through narrowed Harbor Memory and mechanism closure without presenting sealing as uncomplicated victory.
entries.meter_behavior: Four-position phrase closes with one deliberately unresolved inner voice.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Contained cadence with restrained dissonance remaining inside it.

transition_policy.entry: Begin after P0.4 public ending punctuation and attribution space.
transition_policy.exit: End cleanly without implying credits or Chronicle completion.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Leave room for seat-by-seat outcome narration.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress closure swells and preserve the contained unresolved inner voice.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original nontriumphant ending music for a drowned harbor successfully sealed: prepared piano, low strings, bowed cloudy glass, restrained brass-colored resonance, Harbor Memory phrase closes around one unresolved inner voice, containment and cost, room for seat attribution, no victory fanfare, no credits theme.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: victory fanfare, defeat sting, heroic orchestra, choir, major-key triumph, credits music, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, trailer ending
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Sealing contains the Harbor but does not erase cost, trapped memory, or mixed seat outcomes.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create attribution-safe opening, contained cadence, reduced-density version, and clean non-credits ending.

entries.approval_boundary: Ending-treatment brief only; no final ending attribution, composition, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Drowned Released Ending Treatment
entries.purpose: Allow the Drowned Release phrase to separate from Bellhouse indexing without turning release into sentimental certainty.
entries.meter_behavior: Harbor Memory phrase loses its measured index and unfolds freely.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Greater vertical space and air without automatic major-key resolution.

transition_policy.entry: Begin after public ending punctuation and attribution space.
transition_policy.exit: Dissolve to silence without credits implication.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Release phrase remains sparse beneath outcome narration.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce harmonic swells while preserving free phrase timing and air.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original restrained ending music for drowned residents released from a harbor memory mechanism: solo low woodwind, string harmonics, bowed cloudy glass, soft harmonium, Harbor Memory phrase freed from measured indexing and unfolding into open air, sorrow and relief without sentimental major-key triumph, room for seat attribution, no choir.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: heavenly choir, sentimental major key, victory fanfare, funeral music, credits theme, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, spoken voices, trailer climax
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Release removes mechanical indexing but preserves the weight of remembered lives and mixed surviving outcomes.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create attribution-safe opening, freely unfolding release phrase, reduced-density version, and silence dissolution.

entries.approval_boundary: Ending-treatment brief only; no final release meaning, composition, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Last Lifeboat Ending Treatment
entries.purpose: Support an incomplete escape where survival, absence, and remaining Harbor consequences are attributed separately.
entries.tempo_behavior: Slow forward motion with unequal pauses.
entries.meter_behavior: Witness phrase moves onward while one or more positions remain behind.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Forward open intervals over a retained distant unresolved pedal.

transition_policy.entry: Begin after launch or escape result and public attribution commit.
transition_policy.exit: End with unresolved Harbor distance rather than credits closure.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Solo line leaves room for passenger and remaining-seat attribution.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce solo and piano peaks while retaining forward motion and distant unresolved pedal.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original restrained ending music for a small lifeboat escaping a drowned harbor with incomplete survival: solo cello or viola, prepared piano, thin reed organ, distant bowed glass, Living Witness phrase moves forward while missing positions remain behind, hope and cost without triumph, no boat SFX, no victory fanfare, room for attribution.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: victory fanfare, heroic voyage, sea shanty, sentimental rescue, ship horn, actual boat sounds, credits music, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, choir
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The Last Lifeboat carries some public outcomes forward while the Harbor and absent seats remain musically present.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create attribution-safe opening, forward witness line, distant Harbor remainder, reduced-density version, and unresolved ending.

entries.approval_boundary: Ending-treatment brief only; no final passenger outcome, composition, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Harbor Rises Ending Treatment
entries.purpose: Represent the Harbor becoming active authority without defaulting to villain triumph or orchestral catastrophe.
entries.tempo_behavior: Measured mechanism awakening with widening low pulse.
entries.meter_behavior: Bellhouse and lighthouse phrase relationships align under Harbor control.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Beautiful but oppressive convergence that leaves witness material partially submerged.

transition_policy.entry: Begin after public Harbor-rise punctuation and attribution.
transition_policy.exit: End on sustained authority without credits or future-state claim.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Mechanism layers remain below public outcome narration.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Remove mechanism density before compressing the low authority pulse.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original ending music for the drowned Harbor rising into active authority: bowed oxidized metal, low strings, cloudy glass, reed organ, damped piano, Bellhouse and lighthouse phrase relationships converge, beautiful but oppressive, Living Witness material partly submerged, no villain fanfare, no catastrophe orchestra, room for attribution.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: villain victory, evil choir, disaster trailer, final boss music, huge percussion, universal defeat sting, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, actual bell SFX
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The Harbor rises through its existing memory mechanisms and public collaborators, with beauty and danger held together.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create attribution-safe opening, mechanism convergence, optional witness remainder, reduced-density version, and sustained non-credits ending.

entries.approval_boundary: Ending-treatment brief only; no final Harbor authority, composition, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Light Comes Home Propagation Treatment
entries.purpose: Carry the lighthouse destination phrase beyond the Harbor in a displaced timbre that is beautiful before its danger fully settles.
entries.tempo_behavior: Slow outward transmission with increasing distance.
entries.meter_behavior: Destination phrase repeats farther away with one altered position.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Warm upper consonance over an unresolved low Harbor interval.
instrumentation: Thin upper string or flute color

transition_policy.entry: Begin after public propagation result and carrier attribution.
transition_policy.exit: Fade into distance without asserting future consequences.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Upper transmission color remains thin beneath attribution.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce upper transmission brightness and mechanism layer while preserving distance and altered repetition.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original ending music for a lighthouse memory signal leaving a drowned harbor: thin upper string or flute color, bowed cloudy glass, low harmonium, prepared piano harmonics, destination phrase transmitted farther away with one altered position, beautiful and unsettling, warm upper consonance over unresolved Harbor depth, no triumph, no sci-fi signal, room for carrier attribution.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: sci-fi transmission, heroic beacon, victory fanfare, angelic choir, sequel trailer, electronic pulse, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, actual lighthouse SFX
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Propagation displaces the Lighthouse Destination motif into a new carrier without revealing future events or declaring it benevolent.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create attribution-safe opening, near and distant transmission passes, reduced-density version, and unresolved fade.

entries.approval_boundary: Ending-treatment brief only; no final propagation consequence, composition, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Names Erased Ending Treatment
entries.purpose: Remove indexed motif positions while preserving traces of witness and consequence rather than using total silence as simplistic oblivion.
entries.meter_behavior: Four-position phrase loses positions until only an unindexed residue remains.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Harmonic context thins without resolving to comfort or pure noise.

transition_policy.entry: Begin after public erasure result and attribution.
transition_policy.exit: End in an authored residue or silence without claiming restoration is impossible.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Subtractive gestures remain beneath outcome narration.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Preserve subtractive phrase logic with narrower residual peaks.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original ending music for names erased from a drowned Harbor record: prepared piano residue, bowed cloudy glass, thin string harmonics, fading reed breath, a four-position memory phrase gradually loses positions until an unindexed human trace remains, restrained and unsentimental, no horror blast, no total-oblivion cliché, room for attribution.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: memory wipe sci-fi, total silence only, horror blast, defeat sting, funeral choir, sentimental piano, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, credits music
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Erasure removes indexed names while leaving the cost and uncertain human residue audible without asserting future restoration.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create staged subtractive edits, attribution-safe opening, reduced-density residue, and optional authored silence ending.

entries.approval_boundary: Ending-treatment brief only; no final erasure meaning, composition, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Mixed Outcome Resolution
entries.purpose: Layer incompatible but truthful public outcomes without forcing one universal emotional verdict.
entries.tempo_behavior: Independent outcome phrases align briefly and then retain separate pacing.
entries.meter_behavior: Several motif positions coexist without resolving into one count.
entries.harmonic_behavior: Compatible open support holds divergent ending colors without smoothing away conflict.

transition_policy.entry: Begin only after public seat and faction attribution establishes the mixed result.
transition_policy.exit: End with divergent colors still present; do not convert to universal victory, defeat, or credits closure.

dialogue_policy.midrange_density_limit: Outcome stems enter only after their public attribution and remain sparse beneath later results.

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Limit active optional outcome stems and preserve divergent motif identity over a quiet foundation.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original modular mixed-outcome ending music for Drowned Harbor: quiet open foundation supporting separate public colors for living witnesses, released drowned, Bellhouse indexing, lighthouse transmission, Tidebound or Restless continuation and Harbor authority; each outcome enters only after attribution, compatible but unresolved, no universal victory or defeat, no credits theme, no speech.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: single victory theme, single defeat theme, emotional verdict, full orchestra, choir, trailer ending, credits music, named composer imitation, copyrighted melody, hidden outcome cue
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Mixed resolution preserves distinct public seat and faction truths instead of flattening them into one ending label.
generator_guidance.human_edit_plan: Create attribution-triggered modular outcome stems, a quiet shared foundation, reduced-density subset, and divergent non-credits ending.

entries.approval_boundary: Mixed-ending brief only; no final attribution logic, composition, mix, implementation, or production approval.
